nasb.text: Jehoshaphat made ships of Tarshish to go to Ophir for gold, but they did not go for the ships were broken at Ezion-geber.

esv.text: Jehoshaphat made ships of Tarshish to go to Ophir for gold, but they did not go, for the ships were wrecked at Ezion-geber.

cnv.text: 約沙法建造了他施船隻，要到俄斐去運金子，可是不能開船，因為船隻在以旬．迦別壞了。

ccb.text: 约沙法又建造了一批他施船，要到俄斐去运载黄金，可是没有成行，因为船只在以旬·迦别失事了。
